title: 2026 Oscar Best Actress Odds and Predictions
text: Action Network reports Jessie Buckley is heavily favored to win the Academy Award for Best Actress at 97% probability for her role in Hamnet. Rose Byrne in If I Had Legs I'd Kick You is the distant second choice at 3%, while Emma Stone, Kate Hudson, and Renate Reinsve are considered extreme long-shots. According to the predictions, Buckley has been a runaway freight train, never falling below 70% to win this award since October. The analyst emphasizes there is minimal uncertainty in this category compared to other acting races, recommending no betting value exists here as Buckley's victory appears inevitable. The 98th Academy Awards ceremony takes place on March 15, 2026, at the Dolby Theatre in Los Angeles, hosted by Conan O'Brien.
